---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# json2vec { #json2vec }

`json2vec`

Public `json2vec` SDK surface.

The top-level package exports the constructors and helpers used by most
applications: `Model.from_schema(...)` for model construction, tensorfield
request constructors such as `Category` and `Number`, data modules, schema
mutation predicates, and the `@preprocess` decorator.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Postprocessor](#json2vec.Postprocessor) |  |
| [RequestBase](#json2vec.RequestBase) |  |

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Model](#json2vec.Model) | Neural model generated from a `json2vec` schema tree. |
| [Array](#json2vec.Array) | Repeated nested object group in a `json2vec` schema. |
| [Number](#json2vec.Number) | Numeric scalar tensorfield request. |
| [Category](#json2vec.Category) | Categorical scalar tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary. |
| [Set](#json2vec.Set) | Multi-label set tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary. |
| [DateParts](#json2vec.DateParts) | Date/time tensorfield request that extracts configured calendar parts. |
| [Entity](#json2vec.Entity) | Per-observation entity tensorfield request for local identity matching. |
| [Vector](#json2vec.Vector) | Fixed-width numeric vector tensorfield request. |
| [Text](#json2vec.Text) | Text tensorfield request encoded by a frozen Hugging Face model. |
| [CustomDataModule](#json2vec.CustomDataModule) | Lightning data module for user-provided iterable datasets. |
| [PolarsDataModule](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule) | Lightning data module for in-memory Polars DataFrames. |
| [StreamingDataModule](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule) | Lightning data module for streaming records from files. |
| [Writer](#json2vec.Writer) |  |
| [Overflow](#json2vec.Overflow) |  |
| [TensorKey](#json2vec.TensorKey) |  |
| [Address](#json2vec.Address) | Slash-delimited stable path to a schema node. |
| [Hyperparameters](#json2vec.Hyperparameters) | Serializable schema and training metadata used to build a `Model`. |
| [TensorFieldBase](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase) | Tensorized field values plus trainable target state. |
| [EmbedderBase](#json2vec.EmbedderBase) | Base class for tensorfield embedders. |
| [DecoderBase](#json2vec.DecoderBase) | Base class for tensorfield decoders. |
| [Plugin](#json2vec.Plugin) | Registry object for a tensorfield implementation. |

### Model { #json2vec.Model }

```python
Model(hyperparameters, *, batch_size=1, optimizer=None, scheduler=None)
```

Neural model generated from a `json2vec` schema tree.

`Model` owns the schema hyperparameters, tensorfield embedders, array
encoders, decoders, and convenience methods for prediction, checkpointing,
schema display and mutation.

#### Example {.doc-section .doc-section-example}

```python
import json2vec as j2v

model = j2v.Model.from_schema(
    j2v.Category("segment", max_vocab_size=32),
    j2v.Category("label", target=True, max_vocab_size=4),
    d_model=16,
    n_layers=1,
    n_heads=4,
    batch_size=8,
    embed=True,
)
```

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [hyperparameters](#json2vec.Model.hyperparameters) |  |
| [batch_size](#json2vec.Model.batch_size) |  |
| [optimizer](#json2vec.Model.optimizer) |  |
| [scheduler](#json2vec.Model.scheduler) |  |
| [locks](#json2vec.Model.locks) |  |
| [nodes](#json2vec.Model.nodes) |  |
| [schema](#json2vec.Model.schema) |  |
| [interprocess_encoding_context](#json2vec.Model.interprocess_encoding_context) |  |
| [from_checkpoint](#json2vec.Model.from_checkpoint) |  |
| [training_step](#json2vec.Model.training_step) |  |
| [validation_step](#json2vec.Model.validation_step) |  |
| [test_step](#json2vec.Model.test_step) |  |
| [predict_step](#json2vec.Model.predict_step) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [from_schema](#json2vec.Model.from_schema) | Build a model directly from schema fields. |
| [select](#json2vec.Model.select) | Return schema nodes that satisfy every predicate. |
| [update](#json2vec.Model.update) | Mutate selected schema nodes and rebuild compatible modules. |
| [extend](#json2vec.Model.extend) | Append new schema fields under one selected array node and rebuild modules. |
| [delete](#json2vec.Model.delete) | Permanently remove selected schema nodes and rebuild modules. |
| [reset](#json2vec.Model.reset) | Reinitialize selected runtime node modules while preserving schema values. |
| [override](#json2vec.Model.override) | Temporarily mutate selected schema nodes and keep runtime modules synchronized. |
| [configure_callbacks](#json2vec.Model.configure_callbacks) |  |
| [track](#json2vec.Model.track) |  |
| [save](#json2vec.Model.save) | Save model weights and schema hyperparameters to a checkpoint. |
| [forward](#json2vec.Model.forward) |  |
| [configure_optimizers](#json2vec.Model.configure_optimizers) |  |
| [on_save_checkpoint](#json2vec.Model.on_save_checkpoint) |  |
| [restore_checkpoint_state](#json2vec.Model.restore_checkpoint_state) | Restore this model in place from a `json2vec` checkpoint dictionary. |
| [load](#json2vec.Model.load) | Load a `Model` checkpoint written by `Model.save(...)`. |
| [write](#json2vec.Model.write) |  |
| [encode](#json2vec.Model.encode) | Return encoded tensorfield inputs for raw or processed observations. |
| [predict](#json2vec.Model.predict) | Return typed predictions and configured embeddings for a raw or encoded batch. |

##### from_schema { #json2vec.Model.from_schema }

```python
from_schema(
    *field_args,
    d_model,
    n_layers,
    n_heads,
    batch_size=1,
    fields=None,
    name='record',
    description=None,
    embed=False,
    attention=AttentionMode.mha,
    n_linear=1,
    dropout=None,
    optimizer=None,
    scheduler=None,
)
```

Build a model directly from schema fields.

###### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type                            | Description                                                                   | Default             |
|-------------|---------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------|
| *field_args | SchemaField                     | Field constructors such as `Category`, `Number`, or nested `Array` nodes.     | `()`                |
| d_model     | int                             | Shared model width.                                                           | _required_          |
| n_layers    | int                             | Number of encoder layers on generated array nodes.                            | _required_          |
| n_heads     | int                             | Attention heads used by generated nodes.                                      | _required_          |
| batch_size  | int                             | Batch size used by data modules, examples, and mocked Lightning input arrays. | `1`                 |
| fields      | Sequence\[SchemaField\] \| None | Optional sequence form of `field_args`.                                       | `None`              |
| name        | str                             | Root array name. Defaults to `record`.                                        | `'record'`          |
| description | str \| None                     | Optional description on the generated root array.                             | `None`              |
| embed       | bool                            | Configure the generated root array as an embedding output.                    | `False`             |
| attention   | AttentionMode \| str            | Attention mode for the generated root array.                                  | `AttentionMode.mha` |
| n_linear    | int                             | Feed-forward block count on the generated root array.                         | `1`                 |
| dropout     | Rate \| None                    | Optional dropout rate on the generated root array.                            | `None`              |
| optimizer   | OptimizerConfig \| None         | Optimizer instance or factory used by Lightning training.                     | `None`              |
| scheduler   | SchedulerConfig \| None         | Optional scheduler config or factory.                                         | `None`              |

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                           |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Self   | A compiled `Model` with modules built for the schema. |

##### select { #json2vec.Model.select }

```python
select(*predicates, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```

Return schema nodes that satisfy every predicate.

##### update { #json2vec.Model.update }

```python
update(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```

Mutate selected schema nodes and rebuild compatible modules.

`target=True` is shorthand for `p_prune=1.0`; `target=False` clears
target behavior by setting `p_prune=0.0`.

###### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                                         | Description                                                                                                                | Default   |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| *predicates  | NodePredicate \| NodeAttribute \| Callable\[\[Node\], bool\] | Predicates used to select nodes.                                                                                           | `()`      |
| strict       | bool                                                         | Raise when a selected node cannot accept one of `values`.                                                                  | `True`    |
| allow_extra  | bool                                                         | Permit updates to extra metadata fields on models that allow unknown fields.                                               | `False`   |
| include_root | bool                                                         | Include the root node in predicate matching.                                                                               | `True`    |
| validate     | bool                                                         | Validate each node after applying candidate values.                                                                        | `True`    |
| use_cache    | bool                                                         | Permit cached selector results. Mutations default this to `False` so updates always evaluate against current schema state. | `False`   |
| **values     | Any                                                          | Schema attributes to update.                                                                                               | `{}`      |

##### extend { #json2vec.Model.extend }

```python
extend(*args, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```

Append new schema fields under one selected array node and rebuild modules.

##### delete { #json2vec.Model.delete }

```python
delete(*predicates, include_root=False, use_cache=True)
```

Permanently remove selected schema nodes and rebuild modules.

##### reset { #json2vec.Model.reset }

```python
reset(*predicates, include_root=True, use_cache=True, descendants=False)
```

Reinitialize selected runtime node modules while preserving schema values.

##### override { #json2vec.Model.override }

```python
override(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```

Temporarily mutate selected schema nodes and keep runtime modules synchronized.

##### configure_callbacks { #json2vec.Model.configure_callbacks }

```python
configure_callbacks()
```



##### track { #json2vec.Model.track }

```python
track(names, /, value)
```



##### save { #json2vec.Model.save }

```python
save(pathname)
```

Save model weights and schema hyperparameters to a checkpoint.

##### forward { #json2vec.Model.forward }

```python
forward(inputs, *, strata, dataloader_idx=0)
```



##### configure_optimizers { #json2vec.Model.configure_optimizers }

```python
configure_optimizers()
```



##### on_save_checkpoint { #json2vec.Model.on_save_checkpoint }

```python
on_save_checkpoint(checkpoint)
```



##### restore_checkpoint_state { #json2vec.Model.restore_checkpoint_state }

```python
restore_checkpoint_state(checkpoint)
```

Restore this model in place from a `json2vec` checkpoint dictionary.

##### load { #json2vec.Model.load }

```python
load(checkpoint)
```

Load a `Model` checkpoint written by `Model.save(...)`.

##### write { #json2vec.Model.write }

```python
write(predictions)
```



##### encode { #json2vec.Model.encode }

```python
encode(batch, preprocess=None, strata=Strata.predict)
```

Return encoded tensorfield inputs for raw or processed observations.

##### predict { #json2vec.Model.predict }

```python
predict(batch, preprocess=None, postprocess=None)
```

Return typed predictions and configured embeddings for a raw or encoded batch.

### Array { #json2vec.Array }

```python
Array(*children, **data)
```

Repeated nested object group in a `json2vec` schema.

Positional children are treated as fields inside the array.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [name](#json2vec.Array.name) |  |
| [type](#json2vec.Array.type) |  |
| [attention](#json2vec.Array.attention) |  |
| [max_length](#json2vec.Array.max_length) |  |
| [overflow](#json2vec.Array.overflow) |  |
| [n_linear](#json2vec.Array.n_linear) |  |
| [n_layers](#json2vec.Array.n_layers) |  |
| [fields](#json2vec.Array.fields) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [model_post_init](#json2vec.Array.model_post_init) |  |
| [check_unique_child_names](#json2vec.Array.check_unique_child_names) |  |

##### model_post_init { #json2vec.Array.model_post_init }

```python
model_post_init(__context)
```



##### check_unique_child_names { #json2vec.Array.check_unique_child_names }

```python
check_unique_child_names()
```



### Number { #json2vec.Number }

```python
Number()
```

Numeric scalar tensorfield request.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Number.type) |  |
| [jitter](#json2vec.Number.jitter) |  |
| [n_bands](#json2vec.Number.n_bands) |  |
| [offset](#json2vec.Number.offset) |  |
| [alpha](#json2vec.Number.alpha) |  |
| [objective](#json2vec.Number.objective) |  |

### Category { #json2vec.Category }

```python
Category()
```

Categorical scalar tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Category.type) |  |
| [max_vocab_size](#json2vec.Category.max_vocab_size) |  |
| [p_unavailable](#json2vec.Category.p_unavailable) |  |
| [topk](#json2vec.Category.topk) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [reject_removed_options](#json2vec.Category.reject_removed_options) |  |
| [check_topk](#json2vec.Category.check_topk) |  |

##### reject_removed_options { #json2vec.Category.reject_removed_options }

```python
reject_removed_options(data)
```



##### check_topk { #json2vec.Category.check_topk }

```python
check_topk()
```



### Set { #json2vec.Set }

```python
Set()
```

Multi-label set tensorfield request backed by an online vocabulary.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Set.type) |  |
| [max_vocab_size](#json2vec.Set.max_vocab_size) |  |
| [p_unavailable](#json2vec.Set.p_unavailable) |  |
| [threshold](#json2vec.Set.threshold) |  |

### DateParts { #json2vec.DateParts }

```python
DateParts()
```

Date/time tensorfield request that extracts configured calendar parts.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.DateParts.type) |  |
| [dateparts](#json2vec.DateParts.dateparts) |  |
| [pattern](#json2vec.DateParts.pattern) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [check_dateparts](#json2vec.DateParts.check_dateparts) |  |
| [check_date_pattern](#json2vec.DateParts.check_date_pattern) |  |

##### check_dateparts { #json2vec.DateParts.check_dateparts }

```python
check_dateparts(v)
```



##### check_date_pattern { #json2vec.DateParts.check_date_pattern }

```python
check_date_pattern(v)
```



### Entity { #json2vec.Entity }

```python
Entity()
```

Per-observation entity tensorfield request for local identity matching.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Entity.type) |  |
| [topk](#json2vec.Entity.topk) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [check_topk](#json2vec.Entity.check_topk) |  |
| [post_bind_validate](#json2vec.Entity.post_bind_validate) |  |

##### check_topk { #json2vec.Entity.check_topk }

```python
check_topk()
```



##### post_bind_validate { #json2vec.Entity.post_bind_validate }

```python
post_bind_validate()
```



### Vector { #json2vec.Vector }

```python
Vector()
```

Fixed-width numeric vector tensorfield request.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Vector.type) |  |
| [n_dim](#json2vec.Vector.n_dim) |  |
| [objective](#json2vec.Vector.objective) |  |

### Text { #json2vec.Text }

```python
Text()
```

Text tensorfield request encoded by a frozen Hugging Face model.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Text.type) |  |
| [model_name](#json2vec.Text.model_name) |  |
| [max_length](#json2vec.Text.max_length) |  |
| [encoder_batch_size](#json2vec.Text.encoder_batch_size) |  |
| [encoder_pooling](#json2vec.Text.encoder_pooling) |  |
| [objective](#json2vec.Text.objective) |  |
| [revision](#json2vec.Text.revision) |  |
| [local_files_only](#json2vec.Text.local_files_only) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [normalize_model_name](#json2vec.Text.normalize_model_name) |  |
| [normalize_revision](#json2vec.Text.normalize_revision) |  |
| [check_model_name](#json2vec.Text.check_model_name) |  |

##### normalize_model_name { #json2vec.Text.normalize_model_name }

```python
normalize_model_name(value)
```



##### normalize_revision { #json2vec.Text.normalize_revision }

```python
normalize_revision(value)
```



##### check_model_name { #json2vec.Text.check_model_name }

```python
check_model_name()
```



### CustomDataModule { #json2vec.CustomDataModule }

```python
CustomDataModule(
    model,
    train=None,
    validate=None,
    test=None,
    predict=None,
    preprocessor=None,
    datasets=None,
    num_workers=None,
    persistent_workers=True,
    pin_memory=True,
    observation_buffer_size=1,
    sample_rate=1.0,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Lightning data module for user-provided iterable datasets.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [datasets](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.datasets) |  |
| [preprocessor](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.preprocessor) |  |
| [preprocessor_kwargs](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.preprocessor_kwargs) |  |
| [num_workers](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.num_workers) |  |
| [persistent_workers](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.persistent_workers) |  |
| [pin_memory](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.pin_memory) |  |
| [observation_buffer_size](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.observation_buffer_size) |  |
| [sample_rate](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.sample_rate) |  |
| [hyperparameters](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.hyperparameters) |  |
| [batch_size](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.batch_size) |  |
| [interprocess_encoding_context](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.interprocess_encoding_context) |  |
| [train_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.train_dataloader) |  |
| [val_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.val_dataloader) |  |
| [test_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.test_dataloader) |  |
| [predict_dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.predict_dataloader) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataloader](#json2vec.CustomDataModule.dataloader) |  |

##### dataloader { #json2vec.CustomDataModule.dataloader }

```python
dataloader(strata, required=True)
```



### PolarsDataModule { #json2vec.PolarsDataModule }

```python
PolarsDataModule(
    model,
    train=None,
    validate=None,
    test=None,
    predict=None,
    preprocessor=None,
    dataframe=None,
    num_workers=None,
    persistent_workers=True,
    pin_memory=True,
    sharding=ShardingStrategy.chunk,
    chunk_batch_size=4096,
    observation_buffer_size=1,
    sample_rate=1.0,
    replacement=False,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Lightning data module for in-memory Polars DataFrames.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataframes](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.dataframes) |  |
| [preprocessor](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.preprocessor) |  |
| [preprocessor_kwargs](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.preprocessor_kwargs) |  |
| [num_workers](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.num_workers) |  |
| [persistent_workers](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.persistent_workers) |  |
| [pin_memory](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.pin_memory) |  |
| [sharding](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.sharding) |  |
| [chunk_batch_size](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.chunk_batch_size) |  |
| [observation_buffer_size](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.observation_buffer_size) |  |
| [sample_rate](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.sample_rate) |  |
| [replacement](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.replacement) |  |
| [hyperparameters](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.hyperparameters) |  |
| [batch_size](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.batch_size) |  |
| [interprocess_encoding_context](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.interprocess_encoding_context) |  |
| [train_dataloader](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.train_dataloader) |  |
| [val_dataloader](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.val_dataloader) |  |
| [test_dataloader](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.test_dataloader) |  |
| [predict_dataloader](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.predict_dataloader) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataloader](#json2vec.PolarsDataModule.dataloader) |  |

##### dataloader { #json2vec.PolarsDataModule.dataloader }

```python
dataloader(strata, required=True)
```



### StreamingDataModule { #json2vec.StreamingDataModule }

```python
StreamingDataModule(
    model,
    root,
    suffix,
    train=None,
    validate=None,
    test=None,
    predict=None,
    preprocessor=None,
    num_workers=None,
    persistent_workers=True,
    pin_memory=True,
    sharding=ShardingStrategy.file,
    chunk_batch_size=4096,
    file_buffer_size=1,
    observation_buffer_size=1,
    sample_rate=1.0,
    replacement=None,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Lightning data module for streaming records from files.

Reads file-backed records, applies an optional preprocessor, batches
observations, and encodes them with model hyperparameters.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [root](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.root) |  |
| [suffix](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.suffix) |  |
| [train](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.train) |  |
| [validate](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.validate) |  |
| [test](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.test) |  |
| [predict](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.predict) |  |
| [preprocessor](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.preprocessor) |  |
| [preprocessor_kwargs](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.preprocessor_kwargs) |  |
| [num_workers](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.num_workers) |  |
| [persistent_workers](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.persistent_workers) |  |
| [pin_memory](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.pin_memory) |  |
| [sharding](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.sharding) |  |
| [chunk_batch_size](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.chunk_batch_size) |  |
| [file_buffer_size](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.file_buffer_size) |  |
| [observation_buffer_size](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.observation_buffer_size) |  |
| [sample_rate](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.sample_rate) |  |
| [replacement](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.replacement) |  |
| [hyperparameters](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.hyperparameters) |  |
| [batch_size](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.batch_size) |  |
| [interprocess_encoding_context](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.interprocess_encoding_context) |  |
| [train_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.train_dataloader) |  |
| [val_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.val_dataloader) |  |
| [test_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.test_dataloader) |  |
| [predict_dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.predict_dataloader) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [dataloader](#json2vec.StreamingDataModule.dataloader) |  |

##### dataloader { #json2vec.StreamingDataModule.dataloader }

```python
dataloader(strata, required=True)
```



### Writer { #json2vec.Writer }

```python
Writer(path, flush_every_n_batches=None, postprocessor=None)
```



#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [path](#json2vec.Writer.path) |  |
| [flush_every_n_batches](#json2vec.Writer.flush_every_n_batches) |  |
| [postprocessor](#json2vec.Writer.postprocessor) |  |
| [schema](#json2vec.Writer.schema) |  |
| [writer](#json2vec.Writer.writer) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [write_on_batch_end](#json2vec.Writer.write_on_batch_end) |  |
| [on_predict_end](#json2vec.Writer.on_predict_end) |  |

##### write_on_batch_end { #json2vec.Writer.write_on_batch_end }

```python
write_on_batch_end(
    trainer,
    pl_module,
    output,
    batch_indices,
    batch,
    batch_idx,
    dataloader_idx,
)
```



##### on_predict_end { #json2vec.Writer.on_predict_end }

```python
on_predict_end(trainer, pl_module)
```



### Overflow { #json2vec.Overflow }

```python
Overflow()
```



#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [head](#json2vec.Overflow.head) |  |
| [tail](#json2vec.Overflow.tail) |  |
| [error](#json2vec.Overflow.error) |  |

### TensorKey { #json2vec.TensorKey }

```python
TensorKey()
```



#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [value](#json2vec.TensorKey.value) |  |
| [content](#json2vec.TensorKey.content) |  |
| [state](#json2vec.TensorKey.state) |  |
| [trainable](#json2vec.TensorKey.trainable) |  |
| [targets](#json2vec.TensorKey.targets) |  |
| [metadata](#json2vec.TensorKey.metadata) |  |
| [intervals](#json2vec.TensorKey.intervals) |  |
| [probability](#json2vec.TensorKey.probability) |  |
| [topk](#json2vec.TensorKey.topk) |  |
| [embedding](#json2vec.TensorKey.embedding) |  |

### Address { #json2vec.Address }

```python
Address()
```

Slash-delimited stable path to a schema node.

### Hyperparameters { #json2vec.Hyperparameters }

```python
Hyperparameters()
```

Serializable schema and training metadata used to build a `Model`.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [model_config](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.model_config) |  |
| [name](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.name) |  |
| [type](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.type) |  |
| [description](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.description) |  |
| [d_model](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.d_model) |  |
| [fields](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.fields) |  |
| [embed](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.embed) |  |
| [dropout](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.dropout) |  |
| [target](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.target) |  |
| [arrays](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.arrays) |  |
| [requests](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.requests) |  |
| [active_requests](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.active_requests) |  |
| [shapes](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.shapes) |  |
| [depthwise](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.depthwise) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [update_values](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.update_values) |  |
| [jmespath_member](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.jmespath_member) |  |
| [query_for_source](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.query_for_source) | Infer a request-level query for a leaf source field. |
| [request_from_leaf](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.request_from_leaf) |  |
| [from_schema_node](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.from_schema_node) |  |
| [from_schema](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.from_schema) | Build hyperparameters from schema fields. |
| [model_post_init](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.model_post_init) |  |
| [overflows](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.overflows) |  |
| [clear_selection_cache](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.clear_selection_cache) |  |
| [refresh_selection_cache](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.refresh_selection_cache) |  |
| [select](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.select) |  |
| [update](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.update) | Mutate matching schema nodes. |
| [extend](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.extend) | Append new schema fields under the single array selected by predicates. |
| [delete](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.delete) | Permanently remove selected schema nodes from the tree. |
| [override](#json2vec.Hyperparameters.override) |  |

##### update_values { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.update_values }

```python
update_values(values)
```



##### jmespath_member { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.jmespath_member }

```python
jmespath_member(value)
```



##### query_for_source { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.query_for_source }

```python
query_for_source(array_path, source)
```

Infer a request-level query for a leaf source field.

The encoder prepends the outer batch selector during search. Inferred
queries therefore start at the processed-observation level: `[*].amount`,
not `[*][*].amount`.

##### request_from_leaf { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.request_from_leaf }

```python
request_from_leaf(leaf)
```



##### from_schema_node { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.from_schema_node }

```python
from_schema_node(node, *, array_path=())
```



##### from_schema { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.from_schema }

```python
from_schema(
    *field_args,
    d_model,
    n_layers,
    n_heads,
    fields=None,
    name='record',
    description=None,
    embed=False,
    attention=AttentionMode.mha,
    n_linear=1,
    dropout=None,
)
```

Build hyperparameters from schema fields.

##### model_post_init { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.model_post_init }

```python
model_post_init(__context)
```



##### overflows { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.overflows }

```python
overflows(address)
```



##### clear_selection_cache { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.clear_selection_cache }

```python
clear_selection_cache()
```



##### refresh_selection_cache { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.refresh_selection_cache }

```python
refresh_selection_cache()
```



##### select { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.select }

```python
select(*predicates, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```



##### update { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.update }

```python
update(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```

Mutate matching schema nodes.

`target=True` is normalized to `p_prune=1.0`; `target=False` clears the
target prune rate by setting `p_prune=0.0`.

##### extend { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.extend }

```python
extend(*args, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```

Append new schema fields under the single array selected by predicates.

##### delete { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.delete }

```python
delete(*predicates, include_root=False, use_cache=True)
```

Permanently remove selected schema nodes from the tree.

##### override { #json2vec.Hyperparameters.override }

```python
override(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```



### TensorFieldBase { #json2vec.TensorFieldBase }

```python
TensorFieldBase()
```

Tensorized field values plus trainable target state.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [content](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.content) |  |
| [state](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.state) |  |
| [trainable](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.trainable) |  |
| [targets](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.targets) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [new](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.new) |  |
| [empty](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.empty) |  |
| [mask](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.mask) |  |
| [target](#json2vec.TensorFieldBase.target) |  |

##### new { #json2vec.TensorFieldBase.new }

```python
new(values, address, hyperparameters, strata)
```



##### empty { #json2vec.TensorFieldBase.empty }

```python
empty(batch_size, address, hyperparameters)
```



##### mask { #json2vec.TensorFieldBase.mask }

```python
mask(p_mask)
```



##### target { #json2vec.TensorFieldBase.target }

```python
target(p_prune)
```



### EmbedderBase { #json2vec.EmbedderBase }

```python
EmbedderBase(hyperparameters, address)
```

Base class for tensorfield embedders.

### DecoderBase { #json2vec.DecoderBase }

```python
DecoderBase(hyperparameters, address)
```

Base class for tensorfield decoders.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [address](#json2vec.DecoderBase.address) |  |
| [sigma](#json2vec.DecoderBase.sigma) |  |
| [pool](#json2vec.DecoderBase.pool) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [decode](#json2vec.DecoderBase.decode) |  |
| [forward](#json2vec.DecoderBase.forward) |  |

##### decode { #json2vec.DecoderBase.decode }

```python
decode(pooled)
```



##### forward { #json2vec.DecoderBase.forward }

```python
forward(parcels, *, embed=False)
```



### Plugin { #json2vec.Plugin }

```python
Plugin(name)
```

Registry object for a tensorfield implementation.

Register request, tensorfield, embedder, decoder, loss, and write
components with `@plugin.register`. Creating a plugin with an existing
name replaces the registry entry and emits a warning.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [name](#json2vec.Plugin.name) |  |
| [components](#json2vec.Plugin.components) |  |
| [callback_factories](#json2vec.Plugin.callback_factories) |  |
| [Request](#json2vec.Plugin.Request) |  |
| [TensorField](#json2vec.Plugin.TensorField) |  |
| [Embedder](#json2vec.Plugin.Embedder) |  |
| [Decoder](#json2vec.Plugin.Decoder) |  |
| [loss](#json2vec.Plugin.loss) |  |
| [write](#json2vec.Plugin.write) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [register](#json2vec.Plugin.register) | Register one tensorfield component with this plugin. |
| [callback](#json2vec.Plugin.callback) | Register a Lightning callback factory for this tensorfield. |
| [callbacks](#json2vec.Plugin.callbacks) | Instantiate all registered callback factories. |

##### register { #json2vec.Plugin.register }

```python
register(obj, component=None)
```

Register one tensorfield component with this plugin.

##### callback { #json2vec.Plugin.callback }

```python
callback(factory)
```

Register a Lightning callback factory for this tensorfield.

##### callbacks { #json2vec.Plugin.callbacks }

```python
callbacks()
```

Instantiate all registered callback factories.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [preprocess](#json2vec.preprocess) | Register a callable as a `json2vec` preprocessor. |
| [where](#json2vec.where) | Start a schema predicate against a node attribute. |

### preprocess { #json2vec.preprocess }

```python
preprocess(func=None, *, yields=None, **kwargs)
```

Register a callable as a `json2vec` preprocessor.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                         | Description                                                 | Default   |
|----------|------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| func     | Callable\[..., Any\] \| None | Callable to register when used as `@preprocess`.            | `None`    |
| yields   | bool \| None                 | Set to `True` for generator preprocessors.                  | `None`    |
| **kwargs | Any                          | Reserved for validation of unsupported decorator arguments. | `{}`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                     |
|--------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Callable\[..., Any\] | The original callable, after registering it in `PREPROCESSORS`. |

#### Example {.doc-section .doc-section-example}

```python
import json2vec as j2v

@j2v.preprocess
def normalize(record: dict) -> dict:
    return {**record, "amount": float(record["amount"])}
```

### where { #json2vec.where }

```python
where(name)
```

Start a schema predicate against a node attribute.
